info.title: .NET Android SDK Tool
info.description: .NET tool for Android SDK management related tasks

options.name: --device
options.description:
Device Id or NumericId (Possible options from: `avd
devices`)

options.name: --target
options.description:
Target Id or NumericId (Possible options from: `avd
targets`)

options.name: --sdcard-size
options.description: Size of SDCard to create in MB

options.name: --abi
options.description:
The ABI to use for the AVD (Auto-selects if there is
only one ABI)

options.name: --skin
options.description: The name of a skin to use with this device

options.name: --force
options.description: Force the creation of the AVD

options.name: --force
options.description:
Stop the running emulator (if any) before deleting and
suppress all errors (cleanup mode)

commands.name: start
commands.description: Starts an existing available AVD by name

options.name: --wait-exit
options.description: Wait for emulator process to exit

options.name: --timeout
options.description:
Timeout in seconds if waiting for emulator to
boot

options.name: --camera-back
options.description:
Emulation mode for a camera facing backwards
(Possible values: emulated, webcam#, none)

options.name: --camera-front
options.description: Emulation mode for a camera facing forward

options.name: --port
options.description:
The TCP port number for the console and adb
(Possible values: ranges from 5554 to 5682)

options.name: --memory
options.description:
The physical RAM size in MB (Possible values:
ranges from 1536 to 8192)

options.name: --cores
options.description:
The number of virtual CPU cores (overrides the
emulator default)

options.name: --partition-size
options.description: The system/data partition size in MB

options.name: --cache-size
options.description:
The cache partition size in MB (Default is 66
MB)

options.name: --screen
options.description:
Emulated touch screen mode (Possible values:
touch, multi-touch, no-touch)

options.name: --engine
options.description:
Emulator engine (Possible values: auto, classic,
qemu2)

options.name: --accel
options.description:
Acceleration mode (Possible values: auto, off,
on)

options.name: --no-boot-anim
options.description:
Disable boot animation during emulator startup
for faster booting

options.name: --no-jni
options.description:
Disable extended Java Native Interface (JNI)
checks

options.name: --no-animations
options.description:
Disable all window, transition, and animator
animation scales on the emulator (persists for
this AVD until changed)

options.name: --cpu-threshold
options.description:
Wait for guest CPU load average to drop below
this threshold before proceeding

options.name: --response-threshold
options.description:
Maximum response time in seconds for device
stability probes (waits for 3 consecutive
responses under this threshold before
proceeding)

options.name: --id
options.description: Serial or Device to filter for

options.name: --id
options.description: Serial or Device to filter for

commands.name: launch
commands.description: Launches an app on a device

options.name: --id
options.description: Serial or Device to filter for

options.name: --activity
options.description:
Activity name to launch (optional - uses
default launcher activity if not specified)

options.name: --wait
options.description: True       Wait for the activity to finish launching

commands.name: logcat
commands.description: Dumps logcat from a running emulator or device

options.name: --id
options.description: Serial or Device to filter for

options.name: --output
options.description:
Output file path (if not specified, dumps to
stdout)

commands.name: packages
commands.description: Lists installed packages on a device

options.name: --id
options.description: Serial or Device to filter for

options.name: --id
options.description: Serial or Device to filter for

options.name: --keep-data
options.description: Keep the data and cache directories

commands.name: dotnet-prefer
commands.description: Sets the DotNet (.NET) preferred JDK location

commands.name: find
commands.description: Searches for and returns the JAVA_HOME path to best matching JDK

options.name: --version
options.description:
Filter returned versions based on a NuGet syntax
version or version range

commands.name: list
commands.description: Searches for and lists JDK locations

options.name: --path
options.description: Additional JDK Home Paths to search

options.name: --version
options.description:
Filter returned versions based on a
NuGet syntax version or version range

options.name: --force
options.description:
Force license accept without display license text
or requiring any user interaction

commands.name: dotnet-prefer
commands.description: Sets the DotNet (.NET) preferred SDK location

commands.name: download
commands.description: Downloads a new copy of the Android SDK cmdline-tools

options.name: --force
options.description:
Forces re-download of cmdline-tools even if already
installed

options.name: --preview
options.description: Allow preview versions to be downloaded

options.name: --arch
options.description:
Optional specific architecture (current host arch is
default)

options.name: --os
options.description: Optional specific OS (current host OS is default)

commands.name: find
commands.description: Searches for and returns the ANDROID_HOME path to best matching Android SDK

commands.name: install
commands.description: Installs and/or Updates the specified Android SDK package(s)

commands.name: uninstall
commands.description: Uninstalls the specified Android SDK package(s)
